---
title: "Background and theory"
subtitle: "Evaluation, part 1 --- PMAP 8521, SEMESTER YEAR"
author: "YOUR NAME HERE"  # Replace with your actual name
date: "DATE GOES HERE"  # Replace with the date
date-format: "long"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    knitr:
      opts_chunk: 
        dev: "ragg_png"
        dpi: 300
  typst:
    toc: false
    output-file: PREFIX_eval-01-background-theory.pdf
    pdf-standard: ua-1
    callout-appearance: minimal
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        // TOC stuff
        // Make the title centered and slightly smaller than a full heading
        #show outline: it => {
          show heading: it => align(center, text(size: 0.75em, it))
          it
        }
    include-before-body: 
      text: |
        // Color links with pink-ish red from viridis plasma: 
        // viridisLite::viridis(8, option = "inferno", begin = 0.1, end = 0.9)[4]
        #show link: set text(fill: rgb("a52c60"))

        // Keep track of previous heading levels
        #let last-heading-level = state("last-heading-level", 0)

        // Add page breaks before all level 1 headings
        // Add page breaks before level 2 headings that don't come after level 1
        #show heading: it => {
          context {
            let prev-level = last-heading-level.get()

            if it.level == 1 {
              pagebreak(weak: true)
              last-heading-level.update(1)
            } else if it.level == 2 {
              if prev-level != 1 {
                pagebreak(weak: true)
              }
              last-heading-level.update(2)
            } else {
              last-heading-level.update(it.level)
            }
          }
          it
        }
  pdf:
    toc: true
  docx:
    toc: true
---

The answers to this problem set are entirely unique to the program you chose. 

Hopefully you did a good job!
